text: You know, Weegee was a little hasty here if you ask me. He'd created a being with the combined powers of himself (or at least a fraction thereof, since there was no level increase seen) and Guy Who Moves His Head. And it wasn't as if the Weegee-fied Guy had done anything to actually fight Weegee after being turned. Basically, what I'm trying to say is Weegee just went and atomized what could have been a slightly more powerful than average minion Weegee because it retained its old meme powers. What a shame.

text:
I've seen this about several times on YouTube before and it's absolutely hilarious.

Aladin was made by a nefarious German animation studio Dingo Pictures and it is a total rip off of Disney's Aladdin (1992). Dingo Pictures is infamous infamous for creating traditionally-animated cartoons based on fairy tales and concepts plagiarising the works of Disney, Pixar, Don Bluth, and DreamWorks. They have very cheesy and bad animation, repetitive dialogue, reuse of music and sound effects. lack of dub actors (usually two voice actors, one male and one female, in some cases only one), and shoddy character designs, often looking as if it were traced from another cartoon.
